---
name: Specification or schema issue
about: Report an error, ambiguity, or inconsistency in the spec, schemas, or docs
title: "[Issue] "
labels: bug
---

## Where
File and section (e.g. `SPEC.md` §5.2, or `schemas/v1/event.schema.json`).

## What's wrong
The error, ambiguity, or inconsistency. Quote the exact text if helpful.

## Expected / suggested
What it should say or do instead.

## Minimal example (if applicable)
A small DcpMessage that demonstrates the problem (and whether it is wrongly
accepted or wrongly rejected by `reference/validate.mjs`).
